chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR -.PN2022 {0 1118-0.س ٥at٤ Order Iith signature of Judge For ordan on offlca objactloni For haaring ol maln عaود 0&092023 Mr Waqar Ali advocate for the Petitioner M٢، Ali Balouch, AAG with Niaz Hussain Magnejo, Focal Person DC Office Khairpur ~٦7٥441 111444 Petitioner widow of deceased Abdul Sattar who was Naib Qasid (BPS-OZ) in the of Deputy Commissioner Khairpur has filed this petition for releasing of pensionary benefits to her, learned Counsel for the Petitioner has filed statement dated 06.09.2023 alongwith cOPy order dated 18.08.2023, passed by Family Judge & Judicial Magistrate Khairpur appointing the petitioner as guardian of minor daughter namely Alisha ٧nder Section 10 rw Section & 25 of G&W Act 1890. of which has been supplied to learned AAG and Focal person on behalf of Deputy Commissioner Khairpur After receiving the same Foca Person DC Khairpur undertakes that the pensionary papers would be prepared and sent to District Accounts Officer for releasing the amount of pension and other benefits to petitioner He submits that deceased had two wives From first wife, deceased has also minor daughter, who would be given her share proportion wise Petitioner and her Counsel are satisfied and this petition is accordingly dispos٤d of by directing Deputy Commissioner Khairpur to prepare the relevant papers for sending the case 0{ petitioner and the mInor daughter of deceased from first wife, for releasing pensionary benefits as per rules to concerned officer and after which the pension to petitioner and minor daughter of the deceased shall be issued proportion wise Compliance report be submitted within two months for perusal in chamber Phulpoto, Raza along office Today cOPy
